# LogiPredict — ML-Based Supply Chain Delay Prediction System

## Overview

LogiPredict is a Machine Learning project that predicts shipment delivery delays using logistics and transportation data.

The project performs:

* Data Cleaning
* Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
* Feature Engineering
* Machine Learning Modeling
* Shipment Delay Prediction
* Business Insights Generation
* Automated PDF/CSV Reporting

---

## Technologies Used

* Python
* Pandas
* NumPy
* Matplotlib
* Seaborn
* Scikit-learn
* Jupyter Notebook
* FPDF

---

## Machine Learning Model

* Random Forest Regressor

---

## Features

* Predicts shipment delivery delays
* Identifies logistics risk factors
* Generates operational recommendations
* Creates automated business reports
* Performs feature importance analysis

---

## Project Structure

```text
LogiPredict/
│
├── data/
├── notebooks/
├── models/
├── reports/
├── visuals/
├── README.md
└── requirements.txt
```

---

## Sample Outputs

* Delivery Delay Prediction
* Correlation Heatmap
* Feature Importance Analysis
* PDF Shipment Reports
